---
title: "hunter.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\skills\local\KnowledgeHunter\hunter.py"
loc: 52
complexity: 6
logic_score: 3.05
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 4.48
overall_score: 2.81
---

## Intent
The `hunter.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on KnowledgeHunter, __init__, hunt. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via KnowledgeHunter, __init__, hunt. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 3.0/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 4.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 18 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.sentinel._bootstrap](file://src.sentinel._bootstrap)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.tools.brave_search](file://src.tools.brave_search)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)

### Exports
- `KnowledgeHunter`
- `__init__`
- `hunt`
